subcodes.first_line: O faithful friend of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! In the ocean's expanse, the fire of God's love is in intense fervor, and the people of the ship are gathered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار صادق عبدالبهاء در محیط آب نار محبت الله در شدت التهابست اهل کشتی جمع
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @love of God
